description: Preflight the one credential every DIG flow needs — the OSMO credential hf-token that gates the gated Hugging Face downloads (models, datasets, USD assets, pretrained bundle); when HF_TOKEN is exported it also probes the gated Cosmos-AnomalyGen / Cosmos-Predict2 repos for read scope.
rules: read-only by intent: lists OSMO credentials and (only if HF_TOKEN is exported and not --no-probe) makes outbound HF probes; will auto-set hf-token from HF_TOKEN if missing
no registry credential is required — paidf-* images are public on nvcr.io/nvidia/ and pull anonymously
set NO_PROBE=true in restricted-egress shells to skip the outbound HF probes
run once per conversation before the first submit (cache the verdict in memory)
usage: Optionally set NO_PROBE=true (restricted egress) and export HF_TOKEN. preflight_credentials writes its verdict to credentials_report.txt under record_store; the JSON line reports verified true/false. Requires the osmo CLI to reach the cluster — offline it records that and passes (verified=false).
limitation: Authoritative verification requires the osmo CLI and OSMO API reachability; the HF scope probes require HF_TOKEN exported plus network egress to huggingface.co. Offline / no-osmo runs degrade to a non-authoritative report.
